patch.value: Add package resource loader for skills prompts themes docs
Extend package installation/discovery beyond extension manifests so pm packages can carry agent skills, prompts, themes, docs, commands, and other shareable resources.
Installed package resources are discovered deterministically; project scope wins over global; unsupported resource kinds produce clear diagnostics; tests cover package resource precedence.

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Plan item created after initial install slice: runtime extension packages are supported first,while non-extension resource loading needs a separate implementation surface.

author: codex-agent

patch.value: Package resource kinds remain provider-neutral and pm-specific; unsupported agent-harness resources produce clear docs guidance; project scope precedence and install diagnostics are covered by tests.

Extend package discovery only where the resource is a pm project-management concern. Agent-harness resources such as prompts, skills, and MCP bundles stay in separate adapter packages; core pm packages should expose extension/runtime resources with explicit manifests, diagnostics, and precedence rules.
Generalize pm package resources for project-management extensions

message: Normalize package resource plan to pm-specific scope

author: codex-agent
message: Start package resource generalization implementation slice

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Package externalization update: removed active tracked Beads/Todos extension copies from .agents/pm/extensions through package uninstall flows and switched unit imports/coverage to packages/pm-beads and packages/pm-todos package roots. pm package manage --project now reports zero installed project extensions in the repo; first-party optional commands remain installable via pm install packages/pm-beads and pm install packages/pm-todos.

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Scope update: duplicate search for wildcard install and TypeScript package entrypoints found only closed package install/E2E tasks plus this active package-resource item. Implementing pm install '*'/'all' for bundled first-party packages and making package entrypoint sources TypeScript-authored while keeping runtime JS artifacts for current Node-compatible extension loading.

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Evidence: implemented pm install '*' / pm install all for bundled first-party packages, added TypeScript-authored package entrypoint sources, marked first-party package roots as ESM, made pnpm typecheck cover packages via tsconfig.packages.json, switched scaffold output to ESM-safe exports, and documented install-all in quickstart/commands/extensions/package READMEs. Verification passed: pnpm typecheck; focused 7-file package suite (130 tests); built CLI integration (67 tests); pm test pm-su6i --run (3/3 linked tests passed); static quality; full release gate with 91 files/1287 tests at 100% coverage; manual temp project /tmp/pm-package-e2e-OsuLRa; telemetry/Sentry live checks.

patch.value: Package resource externalization slice completed with install-all bundled packages, TypeScript package source typechecking, ESM-safe scaffolds, docs, and tests.

Users can install bundled first-party packages with pm install '*' or pm install all; first-party package sources are TypeScript-authored and typechecked; package workflow remains provider-neutral and pm-specific.

pm install '*' and pm install all install Beads and Todos packages in deterministic order; package TS sources are checked by pnpm typecheck; docs, focused tests, linked tests, manual temp-project E2E, release gates, telemetry, and Sentry verification passed.

value.text: Evidence: implemented package install-all support across runExtension/register-setup so quoted '*', all, and shell-expanded pm install * install the bundled first-party packages; added TypeScript package entrypoint/typecheck coverage; updated docs. Verified pnpm build, pnpm typecheck, focused 8-file package/CLI suite (197 tests), manual isolated unquoted shell pm install * smoke, full run-gates release pipeline (91 files/1287 tests/100% coverage), Sentry/telemetry gate, and live telemetry readback for fresh init/install events. Project validate/health still report only the pre-existing history drift blocker tracked on pm-xk39.
